analyst_briefing: All planetary boundaries hold current status: climate_change beyond_boundary with El Niño forecast (Tier 1 NOAA) noting potential forcing amplification but no status shift. Others stable absent signals. Tipping elements (AMOC, ice_sheets, permafrost, Amazon, coral) register no_signal across board, confirmed Tier 1 silence (PIK/Copernicus). Cascade detection flags El Niño as food_insecurity continuation candidate, poised for escalation via drought risks; aligns with standing watch on ENSO anomalies. Cross-monitor: SCEM for climate-conflict nexus (food insecurity), GMM for commodity volatility, WDM low-urgency governance note from AG litigation. No displacement spikes (I2) or economic stress (I5). Threat multiplier via ENSO remains primary signal; regulatory vacuums and attribution gaps quiet this cycle. No contested findings or acceleration flags requiring immediate attention.
